summary: Claude Code headless routing can false-fail from wrong cwd scope, wrong prompt placement, or too-low max-turns; use the stable invocation recipe.
failed_path: Claude Code frontend delegation was judged blocked before validating cwd scope, prompt placement, and max-turn budget.
repaired_path: Use repo-local target paths, prompt immediately after -p, acceptEdits, and max-turns >= 5; use --add-dir for files outside cwd.
evidence: Repo-local JS probe in embedded-admin succeeded with Claude Code headless using acceptEdits and sufficient max-turns.
Verbose trace showed initial Write failed because the file had not been read yet, then Read -> Write succeeded.
notes: This was a route-debug incident, not a frontend implementation failure.
